title: dendrobium leucanthum
intro: Dendrobium leucanthum, also known as the white dendrobium orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anti-viral compounds. The health benefits of Dendrobium leucanthum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve digestion. Dendrobium leucanthum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
